---
title: Glossary
bibliography: references.bib
sidebar: main
page-navigation: true
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Placeholder

This page will collect the terms and conventions used throughout pySLAMMER's documentation and source — yield acceleration ($k_y$), peak ground acceleration ($k_{max}$), the Lee (2004) foundation-radiation damping formulation, decoupled vs. coupled sliding analysis, equivalent-linear vs. linear-elastic site response, and the SLAMMER conventions inherited from the legacy Java program.

Until this page is complete, the [SLAMMER verification page](comp_SLAMMER_results.qmd) is the most thorough reference for terminology in context, and the [API reference](../api/index.qmd) documents every parameter exposed by the analysis classes.
:::
